search_parameters.q: Return ONLY valid JSON with NO other text. Format: { "departments": ["Department Name 1", "Department Name 2", ...] }. List all academic departments at University of Lucknow, India. Example: Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science, etc.
